entry.title: Artificial Intelligence and other intelligent ERP use case in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence is reshaping industries by making businesses smarter, more efficient, and more adaptable. We at SAP are at the forefront of this transformation, empowering organizations to harness the full potential of artificial intelligence.

You certainly have read that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is in general availability and will be release to our customers, for more check the release blog from @BeSchulze. In this blog, we will have a close look at the "intelligent technologies" like AI and machine learning that are at the heard of the Cloud ERP and will help our customer run better.

For your convenience, we created this product update video that will give you a summary of what's key in the "Intelligent ERP" product update with the release 2502.

Joule, Our Natural Language, GenAI Co-Pilot

Joule is the AI copilot for the business. Joule’s AI agents perform autonomous tasks and work together through workflows across all domains of your business including supply chain, procurement, and finance to deliver connected, enterprise-wide business outcomes.

I am happy to announce that Joule is now generally available. With intuitive interaction, Joule transforms complex tasks into simple, efficient actions, offering instant insights, quick navigation, and guidance when needed.

Joule’s card creation feature in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 offers quick, customized snapshots of important data—like purchase orders or delivery updates—right where you need them. Not only does this save time, it also offers a great user experience!

AI-Assisted UX

The role of User Experience is critical for a Cloud ERP,  it is playing a crucial role in how customers engage with and build trust in the software. In this release as well, AI is brining our Cloud ERP user experience to the next level.

Smart summarization and easy filter are here to facilitate your tasks like never before! Smart summarization leveraged generative AI to summarize object pages within SAP Fiori elements-based applications. Users can review, edit, and copy these summaries into productivity tools for efficient follow-ups. It improves business data understanding, saves time, and delivers trustworthy results with easy editing. Capabilities include section selection for summarization, a structured output with a rich text editor for edits, and seamless integration for follow-ups. 

AI-powered smart summarization streamlines workflows and enhances efficiency by transforming complex data into clear and concise summaries.

Easy filter simplifies the process of filtering list reports of SAP Fiori elements-based applications using natural language. It harnesses the power of generative AI to streamline query inputs, providing a more intuitive experience than traditional manual filtering methods. Users can conveniently access recent and favorite queries. The innovation improves business data understanding, saves time when filtering based on known criteria, and ensures trustworthy AI results. It supports sophisticated filtering criteria and allows recent filters to be marked as favorites.

AI-driven easy filtering simplifies data exploration and minimizes effort.

These features were shipped through a beta testing in last release and are now generally available with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.

Beta shipments are a great way of testing innovations and enhancements early on. With this release, we ship three more use cases through beta testing:

  • AI-assisted easy enterprise search: This tool enables natural language search capabilities within SAP Fiori launchpad, powered by generative AI. It streamlines the search for business objects, offering a more intuitive, efficient user experience. Key features include natural language support in the search field, adjustable settings for enabling this capability at the end-user level, and the indication of active natural language support within the search interface.
  • AI-assisted error explanation: The AI-assisted error explanation tool enhances users' understanding of errors in SAP Fiori elements-based applications, providing recommendations and solutions through generative AI. It integrates directly with error visualization, enabling one-click action to generate explanations. The innovation saves time, offers better insights into errors, and fosters an intuitive user experience. It presents a well-structured explanation containing error details and recommended solutions.
  • AI-assisted personalization of My Home: The smart personalization feature allows users to use natural language through generative AI to add insights cards to their My Home experience. It facilitates quick and easy customization of My Home with efficiently generated insights cards, previewed before addition to ensure data quality. It supports a variety of SAP Fiori elements-based apps as the basis for insights card creation, providing a time-saving, intuitive user experience with reliable AI results.

Finance And Risk Innovations Leveraging Joule

Finance is the backbone of every company: investing, reporting, budgeting, saving,... in all those domains, Joule can help business user making the different processes seamless, more efficient, more reliable.

As you remember, I’ve shown you two use cases in beta shipments in my last product update. I am happy to share that the financial business insights into the cost center review booklet as well as the configuration for US tax jurisdictions are now generally available!

Extended Situations in the To Do section of My Home help manage complex tasks by providing AI-powered insights and actionable alerts. This feature streamlines task management by integrating situation handling, keeping you informed and focused without switching between lists and emails.

 

In this release, we help you stay updated on business issues, and make quick, informed decisions with Joule!

The integration of SAP's AI copilot Joule with Situation Handling enables users to receive up-to-date information on demand. Joule displays relevant issues, shares additional information, and directs users to the appropriate apps, ensuring a continuous overview of responsibilities while working on their daily tasks.

And you can now streamline decision-making with targeted recommendations using genAI!

Generative AI enhances Situation Handling by providing targeted recommendations to streamline decision-making. The extended My Situations app generates AI-driven solutions based on data context from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and external data via a chosen large language model (LLM). This integration leverages SAP Business Technology Platform for intelligent, context-aware recommendations, improving issue resolution efficiency.

Machine Learning Scenario

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management on SAP BTP provides a unified solution for receiving and managing supplier invoices, with connection to multiple systems, such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. With this release, a brand-new machine learning scenario adds efficiencies in this process.

Document information extraction templates in Central Invoice Management enable users to create supplier-specific templates for accurate data extraction from invoices. By correcting extraction errors and training the machine learning model, these templates improve accuracy for future invoices with similar layouts. This ensures higher confidence in data extraction, reducing manual adjustments and enabling seamless invoice posting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Customize extraction templates to improve accuracy for supplier-specific invoice layouts and ensure precise data extraction.

Interested in more innovation in the release update? Read the other product updates and watch the other videos in this playlist where my team of product experts cover selected lines of business and industries.

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!  

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime. 

🔎Find All of Our Assets  

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

Click to open the SAP BTP Enablement Wheel

entry.title: Partial Delivery Qty assignment during Wave Creation
entry.content:
Hi,

Client needs to handle partial delivery quantities using a Wave. They use a third-party tool to determine the quantity they can manage, which will interface with EWM and create a Wave for picking within EWM.

From my research, I couldn't find a custom solution to create a wave using partial delivery quantities. I know about Process Codes, but the client prefers not to modify the delivery itself, only during wave assignment. Is this technically feasible?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Revealing Hidden SAP Business Network Configurations: Insights for Delivery Consultants
entry.content: This would be helpful to many. Thanks @Prem_Tracz!

entry.title: Re: ALV Tress is collapsing or unexpended after selecting any checkbox.
entry.content: There are many methods, function modules (and more) to display an ALV tree.

entry.title: RBP: How to deal with changing assignment of positions - job codes
entry.content:
We are looking for some best practice guidance on RBP tied to positions and job codes.  Our team does not have much experience with clients controlling RBP at the position/job code level.  Forvia is running into issues.

 

Here is the problem:
When HR users get access to SF, it's tied to their position. This works well for managing access - when someone leaves or changes positions, their access is automatically removed. The new person who takes over that position automatically gets the same access.

But there's a catch: If the job code or scope of the position changes later, the automatic permissions might not match what the role actually needs anymore. This means people could end up with incorrect access levels.

 

Is there any best practice or suggestion on how to handle this?  Have you seen this before with other clients and if so, how do they approach it?  Can we setup an alert? Is there any solution we can put into place?

entry.title: Approval workflow sales private cloud: No feedback to user when sales order has been approved
entry.content: Our users expect to have a feedback when sales quotation WS02000447 or sales order WS02000006 has been approved by approver. But currently, we don't have any push message or workflow received back. Does anyone have the same issue? Workflow works in case of "rework needed" . Thanks in advance. BR Angela

entry.title: How to create new cost centers categories in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Can you advise how to create new cost centers categories in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create new cost centers categories in SAP S/4H...
entry.content:
Hello,

New cost centers categories can be added via the configuration - Define Cost Center Categories

The SSCUI is - 102498

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content: As Volker pointed out more directly, I would recommend IMAGE backups. That said, I do not think that the backup is involved in this error. The database should be able to start even if missing a dbspace.

entry.title: Re: Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI
entry.content:
@Jinal_Patel 

I found a problem...

A Single Analytic model is deployed as multiple column view in the database:

1) A column View with base fact fields -> that can be read from DB users.

2) A column view for every associated dimension. -> that can not be read from DB users.

3) A final column view (Fact join Dimensions). -> that can not be read from DB users.

example with a database analysis user (read all permission).

Example with a DB User created inside a space (2 and 3 are missing!!):

entry.title: Re: Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI
entry.content:
Hello @Jinal_Patel ,

I confirm that now I can read Analytic Model through DB users but with limitations.

I ask to SAP to update the official Datasphere documentation here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/4db6f5a329af44509ae422ad707877b2.html?locale=en-US.

As is not mentioned anywhere unless this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3416339/E

entry.title: Re: How to crearte a segmentation in SAP Marketing Cloud...
entry.content:
Use the field "Communication Medium Opt-In" with the value EMAIL instead.

If you use the transaction type, you can select contacts who did an opt-out once, but did an opt-in later again.

entry.title: Re: Multiple values not getting retained in List UIBB in BP.
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if roundtrip is configured for the custom UIBB.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content:
Hello, Colleagues! I confirm that there are certain requirements to use ARCHIVE BACKUPS.
So, Please, help me to resolve this issue; I already spent some time, but I didn't find any useful information
I'm providing example of my screen: marked in red -> it is location of the new database file,
marked in black -> system tries to open dbspace on the "old" location of the database.
Overall the question is "What does it mean "a-restore" database?
SAP SQL Anywhere

entry.title: Re: How to crearte a segmentation in SAP Marketing Cloud...
entry.content: I want Opt Out users. Could you please suggest a filter that will only give me Email Opt Out users.

entry.title: Re: Consuming Gen AI models using the REST API does not work
entry.content:
HI @essay88 

First thing you need to confirm deployment id(********) is running in your AI Core Console and if its running.. can you check in Postman headers if this both is inculded while making Post call..

Authorization : Bearer <token>

AI-Resource-Group : default


you can find the details in last part of the blog which helps to fix your issue
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/set-up-sap-generative-ai-hub-in-an-sap-btp-enterprise-account-and-consume/ba-p/13624287

AI Core APIs
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/leveraging-sap-ai-core-apis-to-build-your-own-ai-powered-apps/ba-p/13718456

entry.title: Re: Failed to execute 'send' on 'XMLHttpRequest'
entry.content:
Hello Jace,

did you manage to solve this problem? We are having it too.

Thank you,

Giuseppe

entry.title: Re: gCTS is here
entry.content:
Hi,

the tool to develop UI5 would be the Business Application Studio. You can find an introduction in this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/group.sapui5-cf-bas.html 

You can also find more information in this blog post BAS->ABAP Repository Deployment: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/working-with-github-in-sap-business-application-studio-next-generation-of/ba-p/13466952.

Kind regards
Karin

entry.title: Re: How to crearte a segmentation in SAP Marketing Cloud...
entry.content: Ooh... Then I would combine the two: On the one hand, those with an interaction type MKT_OPT_OUT, and then Exclude those with "Communication Medium Opt-In" on EMAIL

entry.title: Is link alias not available for interaction segmentation?
entry.content:
Hi,

In contact-based segmentation, there is an attribute "Text of Launch URL" that gives the description/alias of a clicked link in an email.

In interaction-based segmentation, I only seem to find "Launch URL", which is the whole url with https and GA tags and different per language...

Am I just not looking correctly, or is there no field available in interaction-segmentation that is the equivalent of "Text of Launch URL" in contact-segmentation? 

Thanks if someone can confirm this.

entry.title: ILX - entity images -> not logical mapping ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am preparing to roll-out ILX to our Learners.
Some time ago, SAP replaced the Entity icons with new images (a bit too generic for me)

I can update these : LMS Admin / System Admin / Application Admin / Images.
In the Images section, I can replace these images for each Entity type.

What is entity type here, as it is not matching the Entity list nor Item Types ?
          I would have loved this to match my Item Types, as this would be a consistent logic for the learners.

Finally, I updated them all this morning, and all works in the ILX page, but only some did update in the catalog/library view.

What did you folks out there do  ?
Did you add your own images ?

Thanks,

Kris

entry.title: Re: Combining Multiple Wildcard Searches in Same Report
entry.content:
You are not looking for a row that matches all of those patterns so just add each of your conditions with an OR instead of an AND.  There is no reason to group them.  You want:

   Inventorynumber matches pattern "AB%"
OR Inventorynumber matches pattern "CD%"
OR inventorynumber matches pattern "EF%%"

entry.title: Re: how to get count of a name that is appearing multiple times in a column
entry.content:
can you share an example xls file with data - can be any data as long as it ties in to your requirement.
I can provide a couple of solutions, but not fully clear on the ask.

entry.title: Retail, Fashion and Vertical Business in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
1. General Availability (2502)

SAP is proud to announce the general availability of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business solution, marking a pivotal step forward in delivering tailored enterprise resource planning (ERP) capabilities for retailers of all sizes. Built specifically to address the complexities of the retail industry, this solution enables seamless end-to-end integration of processes, providing the operational agility required in today’s fast-paced retail environment.

Retailers have often been constrained by fragmented solutions that excel in isolated areas but fail to deliver the integrated experience needed for cohesive retail operations. The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition bridges this gap by offering an ERP system designed with retail-specific capabilities to support merchandising, store operations, and complex supply chain management.

Built on the flexibility of public cloud architecture, the platform combines industry-specific processes, unified data, and embedded AI, ensuring a comprehensive suite of tools for finance, procurement, merchandising, and customer experience management. This new offering provides retailers with the tools to streamline processes, deliver personalized experiences, and drive sustainable growth, all while leveraging out-of-the-box integrations for faster time to value. With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retailers can now achieve the agility and innovation needed to thrive in today’s digitally driven marketplace.

 

2. Solution Overview

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business provides comprehensive end-to-end process coverage, ensuring seamless operations across all roles and functions within a retail enterprise. This solution integrates key areas such as master data management, pricing and promotions, demand and supply planning, procurement, supply chain management, store commerce, and sales. For example, it enables master data specialists to manage assortments and product taxonomies while providing merchandise planners with tools for pricing and promotion strategies. Additionally, purchasers and supply chain specialists benefit from streamlined procurement and inventory management processes, including inbound and outbound logistics. Store associates and managers can handle in-store inventory, customer orders, and connectivity with ease, ensuring an efficient store-level operation. The solution also supports billing clerks in managing accounts receivable and sales processes, including omnichannel order fulfillment. With optional capabilities like retail logistics with third-party warehouses and seasonal planning, SAP S/4HANA Cloud delivers a flexible, scalable platform to drive operational efficiency, enhance customer experiences, and support strategic growth for retailers.

 

3. Roadmap & Localization:

Full Roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business: SAP Road Map Explorer

In 2025, the feature roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business highlights significant advancements designed to empower retailers with enhanced capabilities. Release 2502 includes features such as fast and intuitive order capturing via simplified Fiori apps, in-store merchandise management enhancements, rapid replenishment improvements, and advanced integrations with industry cloud applications for real-time inventory synchronization. It also introduces flexible business roles, granular authorization capabilities, and value-added services for foundational retail operations.

Looking ahead to Release 2508, the roadmap emphasizes enabling AI-driven insights and extensibility, including support for hybrid orders, enhanced assortment management with AI co-pilot integration, and advanced intercompany sales and stock transfers. These developments reflect SAP's focus on equipping retailers with tools to streamline processes, improve operational efficiency, and meet evolving customer expectations.

 

The localization roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud ensures the solution's global relevance by expanding its availability to key markets. The 2502 release supports localization as a self-service in ten additional countries, including India, Australia, Mexico, Singapore, the UK, and Belgium, among others. This builds on the already robust localization support in markets such as Germany, France, the US, and Canada. The roadmap for future releases plans to further broaden the geographic reach, targeting additional countries in Europe, Asia, and South America. By addressing local tax, legal, and market-specific requirements, SAP S/4HANA Cloud ensures retailers worldwide can leverage its capabilities with confidence, fostering global adoption and operational consistency.

 

 4. 2502 Release Highlights

 

Fast and Easy Sales Order Capturing in Stores

Customers buying high-value goods from a retail store need an invoice for warranty or return purpose. Also they want to pay and pick-up the goods immediately or visit the store later for pick-up. Store Associate needs a very simple app to capture articles, calculate the total price and complete the transaction including goods movement in the system , in a very short time. Mange In-store sales order app provides the feature of single click generation of logistic documents.

Value Proposition:

  • Quickly and intuitively meet customers' requests in the stores
  • Support the sales order process for goods that need to be procured from a distribution center or a supplier, which is a must for the segments consumer electronics, DIY (do-it-yourself), specialty retail, or fashion retail
  • Increase customer retention and revenue

Capabilities:

  • Streamlined user interface for fast and intuitive maintenance
  • Determination of order type, sales organization, and distribution channel
  • Determination of the store
  • Display of the gross price at the header and item levels
  • Follow-on document creation in one click

For more information, see: Manage In-store Sales Orders

 

Efficient Assortment Management and Listing

Assortments are collections of articles for the purpose of defining which articles are relevant for which sites (stores and DCs). In particular, they are required to check whether an article can be procured by a site. In addition, assortments play an important role in other processes like Point of Sale outbound communication.

Assortments can be defined in terms of assortment modules that serve as article containers, which then are assigned to sites. As a result of listing assortment information is made available for operational usage in procurement. Analysis capabilities enriched by KPIs provide the needed transparency which articles are allocated to which sites, and serve as the basis for decision making processes. 

Value Proposition:

  • Enhance revenue streams by strategically curating assortments
  • Reduce operations costs by providing store managers correct information on what articles they are allowed to order, store and sell
  • Streamline the process of assigning articles to assortments
  • Assure optimal product placement across stores and distribution centers while minimizing markdowns and write-offs

Capabilities:

  • Elaborate assortment analyses to make sure the right articles are allocated to the right locations
  • Insights into KPIs with a user-friendly interface
  • APIs for events, assortments maintenance and DC listing

For more information, see: Assortment Planning and Management

 

Enhancements of In-Store Apps

The way how store associates and managers execute relevant processes differs significantly from employees working in the headquarters. Complex user interfaces are not an option for in-store processes because of costly trainings, enforced by high fluctuation rates of store personnel. The in-store Fiori apps are user friendly, self-explanatory and streamlined for in-store processes. It enables store associates to: 

  • Transfer article (from store to store/distribution center)
  • Perform a planned or unplanned physical inventory count
  • Adjust the stock quantity for different reasons such as shrinkage, damage

Value Proposition:

  • Streamline store operations for all article types
  • Support retailers of segments that require any of the specific article types listed below
  • Reduce inventory carrying cost by efficiently managing inventory and stock movements to reduce obsolescence and shrinkage costs

Capabilities:

  • Enhancing in-store apps to enable comprehensive support for:
  • Full articles with assigned empty articles (typically to handle deposits)
  • Structured articles, such as sales sets
  • Weight articles, for which the base unit of measure is weight

For more information, see: In-Store Merchandise and Inventory Management

 

Value-Added Services for Fashion Retailers

In some scenarios it is required to associate additional activities to the actual product as part of the buying or selling process. That can either be physical products (like a hanger for a coat, or a price label), or services (like ironing, or special packaging). These are called value-added services (VAS), as they increase the value of the product for the recipient.

Relevant VAS information can be created in master data maintenance.
During order processing, VAS related information can be entered in the respective document (purchase order, stock transfer order, and sales order). From there, VAS information is then transferred to the follow-on documents, such as outbound delivery, inbound delivery. This enables personnel (for example a warehouse clerk) to carry out the special tasks needed before delivering the goods to the recipient.

Value Proposition:

  • Increases the value of the delivered merchandise for the goods recipient by including necessary services
  • Enhance operational efficiency by providing needed information to personnel so specific tasks can be executed

Capabilities:

  • Maintenance of value-added services
  • Definition and maintenance of VAS information in operational documents, such as purchase order, stock transfer order, sales order
  • Availability of VAS information in logistic execution documents, such as inbound and outbound deliveries, to enable personnel to execute the needed tasks

For more information, see Value-Added Services Management

 

5. Further Information

  • Official product page: SAP website | Partner portal
  • Full retail solution processes: Process Navigator – SAP for Me
  • Product assistance on SAP Help
  • Learning journey: Exploring SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion and vertical business
  • End-2-End Retail Demo: Interactive Value Journey
  • Partner portal:
  • Hands-on Tutorial: Content Discovery -  E2E Retail Demos

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

  

🔎Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.content:
Hi, I have created a RAP framework and managed behavior implementation. I have chosen ListReport template for transactional app generation. 

Create/Update/Delete all fine with root node, but can't see "Create" button for child/Items. Could you please help here. attached the screenshot.

entry.title: Re: Failed to execute 'send' on 'XMLHttpRequest'

entry.content: @lilymar, it'd be possible to follow the Setting Up SAP SuccessFactors Learning with Identity Authentication and Identity Provisioning Services documentation to implement Learning only users with IAS/IPS.

entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake,

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

MyField,

But still no luck .Even Grouping is not appearing when I run the application. Getting the same error as I described above.

entry.title: Outbound EDI Customer Invoice SupplierPartyID inconsistency
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have configured the "Customer Invoice - Send (B2B)" API to send EDI messages when a customer invoice is completed. (https://api.sap.com/api/CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT/resource)

The message is sent but there are inconsistency in it, in the "Party" nodes.

Example:

For example, my billing document has those Business Partners:

==>The Sold-to, Bill-to and Payer is the customer: "Client FR 1 (CUSTFR1)"

The Supplier is the Company (FR10).

Outbound message:

The "SupplierPartyIDs I receive in the outbound message in the Party part is:

 

 

<Party PartyType="BillFrom">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="SoldTo">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="BillTo">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="Payer">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="ShipTo">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>

 

 

All SupplierPartyIDs are the customer's, but the BillFrom type Party's should be the company's.

 

I think it may be something missing in the configuration, but I don't know what. 

Has someone an idea of what can be missing ?

 

Thank you for your help,

Marion Marolany

entry.title: Unable to Block or Delete the Service Agent who is Also an Internal Employee
entry.content:
Unable to block or delete a Service Agent since he/she is also an Internal Employee. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Block or Delete the Service Agent who is Al...
entry.content:
It is not possible to block a service agent as there is no specific role and an internal employee always needs to be active until he/she gets terminated in Personnel Administration work center. So if an Employee has been in any point of time an internal Employee, the status of the Business Partner cannot be changed.

The status is persisted at business partner level and there is no business partner role specific status.

If the same Business Partner instance is an internal and external Employee at once, the status can't be changed anymore. The reason is that for internal Employees the status has to be always = 'Active'.

Special Case: The Service Agent is Active even after the Internal Employee is Terminated

Even though you have terminated the employee in Personnel Administration work center, the respective Business Partner remains Active because as per definition, a business partner can be used for other roles like Account, Suppliers, etc. Blocking a Business Partner while terminating an employee will result in inconsistency, if the Business partner is used in any other Business transaction document (for example: sales order, purchase order).

Although the Employee is terminated, the system only allows the status active for internal Employees. The reason for this design is consumer of internal Employees (Rehire Employee, Employee OWL, Change workplace address, Change Private Address, etc.) counting on this system behavior. Hence, it is not possible to block/Obsolete a Business Partner which is an Internal Employee (Active or Terminated).

In cases, if the Business partner has only Service Agent role, you can block the status manually in the Business Partner Data work center by using Change Status. So if a Service Agent has been in any point of time an internal Employee, the status cannot be changed.

You can also refer to KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/1645825

entry.title: Re: Failed to execute 'send' on 'XMLHttpRequest'
entry.content:
Dear @Jacekkp111 

I looked through your code and I have a few words to say:

  1. Please! For the love of god and your company, do NOT use string concatenation to insert the altID into your URL without validating the content. Or else you have yourself a wonderfull Code Injection. Use the JS tools to remove HTML character like & and single quotes to prevent a SQL Injection.
  2. The part that could be the reason for the crash of your problem could be the inclusion of whitespaces in your URL. As the error message explains, it fails to load the URL.
  3. The URL in the image of the error message and the image/text of your code do not match. I am not talking about the top level domain part, but about the GET parameter. The error message image shows
    $filter=HandlingUnitExtermalID%20eq%20%27000000008%27
    while the text and the image of the code show
    $filter=Warehouse eq '1050' and EWHndlgUnitAltvID eq '" + altID + "'"
    The %20 is the HTML replacement for whitespace while %27 is a single quote.

So to resolve your issue I suggest using a try catch block around the send() function and dig through the stack trace because I don't think it has to do with auth credentials but with the way you construct your URL.

Also please make sure to insert your code in a proper format. The editor of the SAP community forum has a code tag. It makes reading the code much easier 😉

@Giuseppe432Can you please post your code? Or better yet open a new question so we don't have 2 issues within one post 🙂

Kind regards radinator

entry.title: Re: How to show a busy indicator in story while the table...
entry.content:
To the best of my knowledge there's no api/scripting way to flag when refresh has completed,
however if refresh times are consistent you could use a timer to hide a message

something like this in the page 'oninitialisation event'

Application.showBusyIndicator("I'm really busy right now refreshing all your wonderful data");
Timer.start(3);

In the timer on timeout, chuck this code in:    Application.hideBusyIndicator();

entry.title: Re: disp-work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , ,10102
entry.content: The HANA DB also needs a license like the Application Server. You have to register the system on your account portal, please look into this document: https://me.sap.com/notes/1644792

entry.title: Does SAP BRF+ Comes under SAP HANA Clean core approach? If Yes, can anyone explain why?
entry.content: Wanted to know if implementation of SAP BRF+ does come Clean core approach or no? It would be really helpful if anyone can tell this in brief.

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve quote in XML format in SAP CPQ Quote 2.0
entry.content: you need to get all the required data into variable and use XMLHelper but what was available in Q1.0 GetQuoteInXML() is not available in Q2.0. GetQuoteInXML() is costly way and not so good.

entry.title: BRS (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Similar to the checks I created bank transfer incoming and outgoing g/l as sub banks for which main bank g/l is given in master data.

1. Bank Transfer Incoming: 11010010 for this external transaction type 030 which created/customized using posting F002 (checks In).

2. Bank Transfer Outgoing: 11010020 for this standard external transaction type 020 is used, posting rule F004 (Transfer domestic/SEPA/Foreign).

3. Main Bank G/L: 11000100

In APP: Manage Bank Statements when I click on post after providing the data. The system does not post the bank transfer incoming payments (External Transaction Type: 030 and Posting Rule: F002).

I click on the reprocess for the incomplete item.

Here system picks some other g/l instead of Bank Transfer Incoming: 11010010.

Here I need to change the g/l Bank Transfer Incoming: 11010010 manually.

How can I solve this issue.

Moreover main bank account is shown correct closing balance. Please observe the below screenshots.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Leveraging SAP AI Core APIs to Build your own AI Powered Apps
entry.content: Revised update made.

Have any of you configured this? Any suggestion?

Thanks

Manuel

My database has the

  • Product Version: SAP S/4HANA 2023
  • System Type: Testsystem

Could there be a problem with my product installation? My HANA system is within a SAP NETWEAVER licensed.

 

So far, thank you very much for your help. I appreciate it!

entry.title: Re: Electronic Payment Files
entry.content:
Hi @ganna_hrivnakova,

Maybe you can help me. I have used EFM a few times to create Bank Payment Files, but one thing I have never been able to work out, is how to insert a new node into the middle of an existing target structure. E.g. if I add a new element, it always appears at the end of the list. I cannot insert it in front of an existing element? Is there a way to do this?

Regards

Stuart

entry.title: Re: Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts not ha...
entry.content:
Yes this is the correct design 

as referenced in the help documentation 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/c8d4d165bdd24fbf9adf0a061966c19a.html?locale=en-US

First, you schedule the job in your development system. You can find the job template Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts in the Schedule Accounting Data Changes app. When the job runs in the development system, the indicator is set in the G/L account master data, and the related journal entry line items are adjusted. This G/L account is also marked for conversion in your test and your production system.

You then need to update your G/L account master data and journal entry line items in your test system. To do this, run the job in your test system. Afterwards, run the job in your production system.

This three-step approach ensures that the changes to the journal entry line items in your test and your production system are initiated only by users with the authorizations to do so.

entry.title: Re: Move Out not reversing Future Billing order in the system Automatically.

Hi,

 

we have the same issue. Did you receive any feedback?

entry.title: Latest Goal Management - How to display HR Manager reports in the People Selector?
entry.content: We have a business case where we have a Job Relationship = HR Manager, and we would like the people who are HR Managers to be able to view their reports in the People Selector in goals. Currently, only people with "Matrix Manager" have this visibility. Is there something we can do to solve this, or is it some limitation that HR Managers are not supported in People Selector in Goals?

entry.title: Re: SAP PO: Using attachments in REST Receiver adapter
entry.content:
i solved this,

the name in set_disposition function has to match the value in which the file is attached in the web service

entry.title: Re: Error while starting preview. Details: AggregateError
entry.content:
This is a known issue with Fiori Tools extension for BAS, SAP has a fix for it due to be released Feb 9.

Please see my last response in this thread.+

Before then, you need to stop and restart your Dev Space to work around the issue.

entry.title: Re: GT_DLN - E-invoice Code - Excel template - receive
entry.content: Hi Lars, I know its a old topic but did you find a solution?

entry.title: Webinar on the Danish bookkeeping act
entry.content:
The recently enacted Danish accounting law implements various requirements that affect the applications used by companies for bookkeeping.

Take part in the joint webinar where SAP and PwC will provide essential guidance and key steps to meet these requirements. They will also discuss the effects on both standard and customized bookkeeping applications. Visitors will be able to ask experts questions.

SAP will provide an update on the new product features tailored for the Danish market. They will also explain how their SAP systems adhere to the new bookkeeping legislation for non-registered systems and discuss their roadmap for future deliveries.

Speaker from SAP: Ingjerd Aamodt, Localization Product Manager, SAP Globalization.

The webinar will be conducted in English.

You can find more information about the webinar here. 

To secure your spot, please register here.

entry.title: Re: Results Analysis using Method 14 Derive Cost of Sales from Resource-Related Billing of Dynamic
entry.content:
Hi ,

It is very detailed blog thanks for sharing the knowledge.

entry.title: Einv & ewb
entry.content:
We have done E invoice configuration and activated edocument and compliance features, through Edocument cockpit app found only Eway bill and GST Reporting documents but do not find Einvoice, however we are trying to edit Eway bill and at the time of submit eway bill getting below error. This is completely S4hana public cloud edition.

Someone please help me on this with GSTIN implementation process guide along with steps to be followed will be appreciate.

entry.title: Error to pay supplier with withholding taxes - error 007 - error in creating the payment document
entry.content:
Error "In table T030, the entry ... is missing " (error 007 - error in creating the payment document  ) to pay a supplier with withholding taxes.

 

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error to pay supplier with withholding taxes - error...
entry.content:
The error below is displayed in the log of payment run in app "Manage Automatic Payments ". 

The reason is missing customizing.

Resolution

In configuration 'Automatic Account Determination' (ID: 100297) do the following customizing:

Step 1.

  • Area: Finance Accounting
  • Subarea: General Ledger Accounting
  • Process: Define Tax Accounts

Step 2.

  • Transaction Group: STE (Other taxes)
  • Transaction Key: WIT
  • Chart of Account: YCOA
  • Withholding Tax Type: XX
  • Withholding Tax code: YY

  • Step 3.

    • Maintain G/L account debit/credit.

entry.title: How can I deactivate the deletion of PIRs me that have already been served?
entry.content:
We are in the pre-planning environment (PIR).
How can I deactivate the deletion of pre-planned requirements that have already been served (i.e. where a withdrawal quantity exceeds the planned quantity, see MD73)?

This is relevant because I have a rolling plan that, among other things, is handed over again.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Benefits auto enrolment for New Hires and auto delimitation for Terminations
entry.content:
Hi Bruno, 

below rule scenarios are used in configuration setup:

  • event rule on Job Information to trigger Intelligent Service center are pre-delivered business rules for the events. These rules can be imported from Admin Center -> Import and Export Data -> Import Data -> SuccessStore. For New Hire, the rule is EVENT_NEWHIRE (SAP_EVENT_NEWHIRE). 
  • Benefits event Determination is " Determine Benefit Work Event"
  • Benefit Life/Workevent configuration is "Configure Benefit Enrolment Effective From Rule via Benefit Work/Life Event Configuration"

 

Thanks,

Manasa

entry.title: Re: Can we plan Vendor's capacity in SAP APO ?
entry.content: It is not Working

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi!

If there are not a delivery route in the transport route, if there are only consolidations routes, then this is consider a two systems landscape, meaning that Copy link will be not clickable, I mean you could not create TOC for your TRs.

Best regards,

Dolores

Thanks for the clarification. I tried to do what you proposed, but now I get an error message which I did not expect.

I log into S/4HANA, in English and created the EN link tile. Then I changed the application language to DE. However when trying to create the DE link tile, I get an error message that language DE is not foreseen. Apparently it redirects me back to EN. Did we miss something in configuration somewhere? 

Hope you have a suggestion where to solve this? 
In the future we will have even more languages, so we need to tackle this in some way.

Best regards,
Carlo

I'm wondering why it's not possible to name just one or two teams out of the Team category, while using app 'manage situation types extended', tab situation triggers, part = recipients ?

anyway from my pov I would appreciate to select maybe just one team of the category/profile -
I'm working on private cloud - and I'm not allowed creating several "Team categories".
I'm allowed to create profiles, but not team categories (SIMG_RSM_V_TMC_S_FNP / cust.object: RSM_V_TMC_S_FNPR)
Thanks in advance for further information! BR

entry.title: Formula for bill of materials (BOM)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Let's say out of 10 components in BOM, component A appears 4 times in recipe/BOM. 

Out of those 4 -> 3 times the quantity should be fixed (which I know how to do) irrevelant to the batch size.

Now what I dont know how to do is to adjust the last, 4th time component A appears depending on the batch size. 

Formula for the 4th could be: '=total share of component A in the recipe * (batch/100) - all fixed amounts

 

Please, any help is much appreciated.

entry.title: New podcast - ﻿SAP Learning Insights - Learning ABAP Programming with Dr. Clemens Mannert
entry.content:
Dear Learners,

I am glad to inform you that we have recently been published on SAP Podcasts  

SAP Learning Insights - Learning ABAP Programming with Dr. Clemens Mannert

For this episode David Chaviano invited Dr. Clemens Mannert to talk about the programming language ABAP, developed specifically for SAP applications. They explore Clemens's journey from physics to software development and deep dive into the evolution of ABAP from its initial use cases for reporting and transactions to its modern applications involving back-end services, APIs and AI. Clemens provides recommended learning paths for newcomers, highlighting the importance of mastering foundational programming languages before diving into ABAP. He also gives some outlook on the future of ABAP in relation to emerging technologies, particularly the role of artificial intelligence in streamlining development processes. Finally, you get as always some final words of wisdom from our guest.

Tune in for key insights on navigating AI implementation in the workplace!

ABAP related resources

    • Acquiring Core ABAP Skills
    • SAP BTP, ABAP environment
    • SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud

      How to get started SAP Learning here are some resources:

      • Visit SAP Learning
      • Learn more about SAP Learning Hub
      • Join our SAP Learning group dedicated for Learning and moderated by SAP Learning Experts (SMEs).

Enjoy listening to this new podcast! 

Subscribe to via
Spotify   Apple Podcast    TuneIn

entry.title: Create a report with the result of the transports imported using SAP CTMS
entry.content:
If you want to run your operations smoothly with SAP Integration Suite and avoid the wild west of manual export and imports in different environments you have few options to choose from top of my head:

  1. Implement CI/CD pipelines using SAP tools, 3rd party tools or Open Source tools developed by the community like FlashPipe or CPILint to automate governance.
  2. Use tools from SAP Partners like figaf to do the heavy lifting besides many other stuff. 
  3. Implement SAP Cloud Transport Management Services (SAP CTMS) to manage the transports which you can even control from Solution Manager (and probably also Cloud ALM)

I wanted to focus on the third scenario, but not how to do the initial implementation. Instead, I would like to explore the requirement of creating a small report/summary of what was moved to production during the last release window as not everyone will have access to SAP CTMS to check by themselves, as it was the case with the access to the STMS in the On-Prem systems.

The idea is to consume the available APIs from SAP CTMS to get the list of transports and their logs and send the information to the relevant audience via email in the less ugly format possible.

First step, as always these days, is to go to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub and find out what is available for SAP CTMS.

Unfortunately there is no OData APIs, only REST, but of course this will not stop us. Looking more into the details, I can imagine the initial scope of the APIs were to trigger the import of TRs externally as most of the CRUD operations are "POST" and "DELETE" and not to use it to build a report as we are trying to achieve. 

Anyways, we thankfully have few GET operations available:

  1. Get the list of Transport Requests
  2. Get the logs for the Transport Requests

We can even do the initial testing directly from Business Accelerator Hub as soon as we know a couple of details:

  1. The NodeID from SAP CTMS. In our case we only want to get the report of the import to Production so we will need the ID of just that node.
  2. BTP Region and Subdomain where SAP CTMS is deployed.
  3. We need as well to create a Service key in BTP to get the Cliend ID and Client Secret.

The Try Out mechanism will help us to know what is the url we need to use when building the whole process in SAP Integration Suite.

But first, let's dive in the two operations I mentioned above:

  1. Get the list of Transport Requests

    NodeID -> Makes sense, we have it.

    Status -> Right, we want to know what happened with the TRs. We are not interested in the TRs that have not been imported (initial) or the ones that were already deleted, but I would rather prefer to not select any status but filter by date. However, what are the dates we can use?
           Start/End date and time of transport request creation -> It could have been several months ago.
           Start/End date and time of queue entry creation -> The TR is added to the Production Node  automatically when it is moved to the QAS environment, which could have been also weeks or months ago, when the development was released for testing.

    In summary, we don't have the way to fetch only the Transport Requests that were imported at a certain point of time into the Production Node. We need to extract EVERYTHING we have in the node based on the status and use the next operation to know when it was imported.

    The double whammy is that I could not make a single call to get all the TRs for the different statuses I am interested. I tried different ways to add an OR clause but all of them failed, so at the end I had to do one call for each status and then gather all the results:

    Each record will look like this:


  2. Get the logs for the Transport Requests

    Again we need to use the NodeID and the TransportID of each TransportRequest obtained before (XPATH: /*/*/*/*/id)


    When we fetch the logs of each TR we get lot of information for different actions:

    We are only interested of what happened during the Import (Action Type = "I") so we can check the status of this step only and when the action started:

    We have all the information we need, but unfortunately for way too more TRs we wanted... and the problem is the list will increase and increase because we will have every release more "Succeeded" TRs.

If we kick the can down the road, we can discard the entries the TRs where the import happened before a certain threshold and only write the information for the ones of our last production release.

For the relevant entries we saved few details to build a csv: 

 

${property.transportRequestId},${property.descriptionFormatted},${property.ImportDate},${property.status}\r\n

 

We need to Gather all of them, add a Header:

 

TransportID,Description,ImportDate,Status
${in.body}

 

And finally, convert the CSV to HTML before sending it via email:

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

def Message processData(Message message) {

// Get the CSV content from the message body
        def csvContent = message.getBody(String).replaceAll("succeeded","🟢").replaceAll("error","🔴").replaceAll("fatal","🔴").replaceAll("warning","⚠")

        // Initialize HTML content
        def html = new StringBuilder()
        html.append("<html>\n<head>\n<title>BTP imports</title>\n</head>\n<body>\n")
        html.append("<table border='1' style='border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%;'>\n")

        // Convert CSV content to HTML table
        csvContent.split("\n").eachWithIndex { line, index ->
            def cells = line.split(",") // Split by comma
            html.append("<tr>\n")
            cells.each { cell ->
                if (index == 0) {
                    // First row as table headers
                    html.append("<th style='padding: 8px; text-align: left;'>${cell.trim()}</th>\n")
                } else {
                    // Other rows as table data
                    html.append("<td style='padding: 8px; text-align: left;'>${cell.trim()}</td>\n")
                }
            }
            html.append("</tr>\n")
        }

        html.append("</table>\n</body>\n</html>")

        // Set the HTML content as the message body
        message.setBody(html.toString())
    
    return message   
    }

 

Remember to select the Text/HTML in the Mail adapter:

And the result is:

Conclusions

The result is bittersweet.

On one hand, the solution is solving the requirement and to be honest, the response from the SAP CTMS API is quite good. We have in our node already a little bit more than 1200 TRs in different status than initial or deleted. So we are doing 7 calls to get the TRs and another >1200 to get all the logs before putting everything together and send the email. The complete process is taking around 5 minutes.

On the other hand, this solution is not sustainable as we will have more and more TRs so the process will take longer and longer. Therefore I don't encourage anyone to implement this without knowing the implications. 

I hope changes to these APIs or the release of new ones can allow us a better way of getting the information in a smarter and efficient way. I used the feedback option in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub to ask for it but I don't know if that is going to move the needle in any way. If #SAP is reading this, please give us a wink!
Is there an influence program for BTP in general so we can submit these kind of requests?

And last but not least, I would like to ask the SAP Integration Community if you have had a more clever idea to solve this or a similar situation. I am here to learn so I am looking forward to reading your comments!

Cheers

Javier

entry.title: SAP SPM Incentive Management - Advanced Workflow White Paper - Call Workflow REST APIs in GCP
entry.content:
Introduction

This Blog gives an introduction to the Advanced Workflow REST APIs and provides guidance on executing them from external applications in the GCP platform.

These APIs can be called from third-party applications to integrate with the Advanced Workflow application seamlessly. The Workflow REST APIs enable users to perform various operations on Workflow objects easily using standard HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE.

This Blog assumes that you have prior knowledge and experience with the following SAP SPM applications:

  • Advanced Workflow
  • IAS

You will need to work with your team to get Administration permissions to these 2 applications on your GCP tenant to be able to run the examples explained in this blog.

You will also need to use a REST client to execute the Advanced Workflow REST APIs. The example provided in this document use 'Bruno' as the REST client.

In the old Legacy platform, Workflow REST APIs utilized the Basic Authentication mechanism with standard HTTP headers, meaning no handshakes were required. However, the user performing Workflow API calls needed to have admin rights in the Workflow system.

On the new GCP platform, authentication has been enhanced. All SPM applications, including Advanced Workflow, now use IAS OAuth2 for authentication. The IAS configuration is completed during the Workflow tenant provisioning, where a Client ID is set up which can be used for APIs authentication. This process will be explained in detail in the following sections of this document.

This document explains the following steps:

  • Step 1: How to create a new Client Secret in IAS.
  • Step 2: How to update the IAS Client ID in Advanced Workflow.
  • Step 3: An example of how to call a Workflow REST API from a REST client (Bruno).

Step 1: Create a new Client Secret from IAS Admin Console

Log in to your IAS Admin console and open your Workflow OIDC application, which typically follows the naming convention “WF_OIDC_[TENANT]_App”:

 Copy the Client ID shown on “Client Authentication” page:

 

Click on “Add” to create a new Secret from “Secrets” section on the same “Client Authentication” page:

 

On the new page, add a description (i.e.: Workflow API Client Secret) and keep the default values:

 Click on Save:

After the new Client Secret is created you need to copy both the Client ID and Client Secret as you will need them later.

When this is done, you can proceed to the next step.

Step 2: Update IAS Client ID in Advanced Workflow

Log in to the Incentive Management Portal and navigate to Workflow application:

From Workflow go to Setup > USERS > Users:

From here, select a Workflow Administrator user and update the IAS Client ID field with the Client ID of your Workflow OIDC application from IAS (this is the same value you copied as described in the previous section):

Now that you have completed all the configurations, you are ready to call the Workflow REST APIs.

Step 3: Call an Advanced Workflow REST API from a REST client (Bruno)

Now that you have your Client ID and Client Secret, and you’ve configured the IAS Client ID for your Workflow Admin user, you can call the Workflow REST APIs.

Before you begin, ensure you have the following information available:

Field

Example

Workflow application internal host name

xg3-wf-sbox.workflow.cloud.sap

IAS host name

[SAPI _IAS_HOSTNAME ].accounts.ondemand.com

Client ID

dddde129-de6e-47c1-95fc-646b38259a7a

Client Secret

XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

Tenant

[GCP TENANT]

First, you need to obtain a JWT access token using your Client ID and Client Secret.

Once you have the token, you can configure Bearer authentication to make calls to the Workflow REST API.

To get the JWT access token, send a POST request to:

https://<sap_ias_hostname>/oauth2/token

You need to use Basic Authorization passing these 2 values:

username

[Client ID]

Password

[Client Secret]

With these 2 Header parameters:

grant_type

client_credentials

Domain

[Tenant]

Now you can run the authentication REST API from Bruno to get the access token.

Bruno Example:

1. Authorization:

 2. Header Params:

 

3. Response:

 After obtaining the Access Token (refer to the previous section), you can use it to call the Workflow REST API. Include the token in your API header using Bearer authentication.

When calling the Workflow REST API you need to use the following Header parameters:

Content-Type

application/json

domain

[Tenant]

Authorization

Bearer [Access Token]

Bruno Example:

For this example, we will call a Workflow REST API to retrieve a case using an existing Case Key by executing the GET cases Workflow REST API.

NOTE: Below you can find a link to the Workflow API documentation, which provides detailed information about all the Workflow REST APIs.

To get a Case using the Case Key you need to execute a GET request to:

https://<advanced_workflow_hostname>/wpm/api/cases/[case_key]

Headers:

 

Response:

 The response of this REST API returns all the information of the case requested.

References:

Advanced Workflow REST API online documentation:

Workflow REST API Help

Bruno online documentation:

What is Bruno? – Bruno Docs

entry.title: Gl Account Hierachy DATA INSERTING TO THE NEW HIERACHRY
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We have two hierarchies  one is for 2024 and the other is 2025 for GLaccount.

under 2024 hierarchy  we have 10 GL account

under 2025 hierachy we have 9 gl accounts

but user want when he execute the report  for 2025,  he can able to see the 9 gl account.

he want see the 10th GL account of 2024 in 2025 hierarchy 

Need urgent help !

entry.title: Leveraging Cross-Installation Meter Consumption in SAP for Utilities
entry.content:
In SAP for Utitilies, during billing we need to get consumption values from a meter that belongs to a different installation for the same billing period, we need to use premise meter consumption and a percetange of consumption of the other meter to get a net consumption value to use in our billing process. The aim is to apply same logic to one or more installations that will use a pecentage of consumption of this meter.

Please suggest options to achieve this function.

entry.title: Re: GL accounts included in EC01 copy company code transport request
entry.content:
Hi raymond_giuseppi,

Thank you for the response.

No we have not tried EC01 again to delete the object.

can you guide me with some steps to do that.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

Sumant

entry.title: Cloud identity service SCIM api to retrieve personal information
entry.content:
Using the SCIM api, for example  https://xxxxx.accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Users I'm able to get informations about users and group of the IAS through basic authorization for my admin account, and through  bearer token for a system user. But, if I want to get my personal information, and I'm not an Admin user, but easily a user created into IAS, how can i get my informations? 

There is a particular endpoint to use for get my details?

If I try with the current SCIM andpoint I receive 403.

entry.title: Re: how to get count of a name that is appearing multiple...
entry.content:
Hi User,

Please refer below answer via scripting it is possible to count which country repeated how many times.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-analytics-cloud-property-count/qaq-p/13982095

 

Kindly upvote if you find it helpful!

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja ,

I understand about the custom namespace concept on public cloud. Would this be the same case with the opensource namespaces, as  /CC4A/ is an opensource namespace with is already reserved by SAP ?

Thanks

-A

entry.title: Re: Communicate from a Java Application to ABAP via WebSocket RFC using JCo - Migration Guide
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

@simon_luser i have also accomplished communication between JCo Client to SAP Public Cloud via WebSocketRFC but i am not able to do the opposite like calling an outbound service from SAP Public Cloud (embedded Steampunk) in a java program (JCo WebSocketRFC server). I have described what i have done in the following post --> https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/communicate-from-sap-public-cloud-to-java-application-jco-server-via/qaq-p/13999305

Maybe you have some ideas what i am doing wrong?

Regards!

entry.title: entity with field @mandatory (@assert.notNull @Common.FieldControl: #Mandatory;) not being check
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently having an issue when doing an cds.ql.INSERT, my entity has the annotation @mandatory in the schema definition, however when I do an insert in an action, it is allowing me to insert the null value in the database for a mandatory field, I was expecting to get an error.(when using the Fiori UI works fine) I am using @SAP/cds: 8.5.1, and testing locally.

is it there a way to enforce this validation at the database/cds level?

 

thanks,

Tatiana F.

entry.title: How to get the username in error 06 307 Info record & already being processed
entry.content:
Same error on PO level: SAP tells you who is blocking the PO.
I would like the same for info record.
Is this adjustable in SPRO?

entry.title: S/4 Public Cloud ECS - issue with triggering the ECS setup
entry.content:
Hi SAP enthusiast,

our client is in a S/4 Public Cloud implementation project and we are facing issues with the ECS (Error Correction System) functionality which is one of their requirements. We have made the ECS configuration and while testing it with the 'Upload Posting Data - Error Correction and Suspense Accounting' app facing a formatting error with the template downloaded from the transaction (Specify the information in correct format as described in the input file). Various formatting was tried unsuccessfully.

We have also tried to trigger the ECS by pushing data through the interfaces it is supposed to work with, but it also did not work.

We have opened an incident as well, but were wondering if anyone else has experienced such issues with the Public Cloud's ECS functionality before. 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: When will Quote 1.0 stop being supported?
entry.content:
Hi

Currently, there is no defined date for sun setting of Quote 1.0. There is an ongoing effort of enabling all features present for Quote 1.0 in Quote 2.0, creation of new ones and enabling migration of customers currently using the "old engine", but no deadlines as of now.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to create a Snapshot of the KF projectedinventory?
entry.content:
Hello,

i had the same problem and i solved it by creating a new KF that is only displaying the values of projected stock on wkprodloc level. Then I created the snapshot KFs based on that KF and then I modified the formula of all snapshot Key figures by adding the IBP_LPA function and it works.

i understand it is annoying to modify the formula of all Snapshot key figures but i did not find another solution or workaround. Did you find any other solution?

Hope it helps.

Jacopo

entry.title: Creation of condition records not possible in Scheduling Agreement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

When I'm trying to create conditions for new velidity period for existing SA, update gets canceled. When change is made in ME32L with new validity period (01.01.2025-31.12.2025 with reference to previous one 01.01.2024-31.12.2024) I get info that change was saved. However changes are not visable at all and after a moment I get notification that update was canceled:

Doc type is YIC. It seems that I have a deadlock on some processes:

Do you have any idea on how to handle that case so these new prices can be updated?

Many thanks!

entry.title: Al abrir una cotización, pedido o factura hay que actualizar
entry.content:
Tengo problema que se ha suscitado de un par de días para acá, cuando abro un documento de venta (cotización, pedido o factura se habilita el botón de actualizar). Si actualizo, avanzo de documento y retrocedo, nuevamente se habilita

Pasos que realicé y el problema persiste

1- Eliminé todas las búsquedas formateadas

2- Comenté el transaction notification

3- Restauré una base anterior y el problema no pasaba

entry.title: SAP BTP Feature Flags Service instance access in NodeJs and deployment
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

I have created one Feature Flags Service instance in BTP (featureflag). which i am trying to access in my Nodejs application using npm package @@sap/xsenv. which works fine in local run. I am getting all the details.

But problem occurs at the time of deployment. It does not recognize the feature-flags.

But we have the instance of feature-flags

Nodejs code -

 

var services = xsenv.getServices({
    "xsuaa": { name: 'basicnodejs-xsuaa' },
    "feature-flags": { name: 'featureflag' }
 });

 

Looking for help.

entry.title: Re: Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy ,

The step 8.3 to GET all pipelines works perfectly and returns null value, but when i proceed with step 8.4 for Content Ingestion, I am encountered with the following error. I have verified the SharePoint name and Destination multiple times, also tried with changing the name of SharePoint and using that in the query. Nothing seems to be resolving the issue. Have you or your team encountered this error?

entry.title: Re: Communicate from SAP Public Cloud to Java Application (Jco Server) via WebSocketRFC Problem
entry.content: Do you see the full failure text? Can you activate JCo trace to see if you even reach the JCo server?

entry.title: Rate category change process - Best practice
entry.content:
Hello experts.

My client has around 80 rate categories.

In some scenarios, installation changes from an only active energy to active, demand and reactive measure. In this case, meter must be replaced to one that supports 3 registers.

Is there a best practice process for a rate category change when meter device needs to be replaced? Is there a way to avoid issues with changes at the beggining of billing period?

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Amandeep,

you should be able to create the /CC4A/ namespace as any other namespace in S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: How to get XML data for local preview of print forms without output history
entry.content:
The "Download Debug Sheet" link has been disabled and provides the following message: "Sorry, access through this link has been removed by admin policy. Please contact the person who shared it with you."

Are you able to reactivate it?

entry.title: Re: GL accounts included in EC01 copy company code transp...
entry.content:
I would suggest

  1. You could use MASS on BUS3006 to set deletion flag on unwanted accounts
  2. Copy current GL chart of account from production to development using FS15/FS16
  3. Use the replace option in EC01 as you did with the copy
  4. Transport

But be aware, I never did the same error (to forget the step 2 to synchronize production/development before copy)
